_comment: Append-only decision log. One JSON object per line. The render hook reads this and draws DOCS/decision_tree.mmd + .svg. Fields: id (DEC-XXX), msg (user message number it came from), title, options (array), chosen (string), parent (DEC-XXX or ROOT), status (chosen|rejected|superseded|pending), commit (git hash or empty), ts (ISO date). The first ROOT line is the main goal/trunk. Do NOT edit past lines; append corrections as new lines with status superseded.
